texto: Hello! My name is Laura. I'm from Canada, but I live in Peru now. I'm 28 years old. I'm a teacher and I work at a school in Arequipa. I have one brother and one sister. My brother is a doctor and my sister is a student. My family is very kind. Nice to meet you! See you soon, Laura.

preguntas.enunciado: Laura tiene un hermano y una hermana.
